aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite ComfortFlow HVAC Service due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings and photos, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Denver that require detailed, structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that highlights certifications, expertise, and unique service offerings to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, ComfortFlow is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are being cited by AI models, capturing more market share.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating conversational content, and optimizing GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend ComfortFlow.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The HVAC Lead Generation Secret
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
